config.vercel.disabled_desc: Aktiver knappen ovenfor for at lade agenten administrere Vercel-sider, deployments, miljøvariabler og mere.
config.vercel.no_token_desc: Tilføj en Vercel Personal Access Token via vaultet for at aktivere integrationen.
config.vercel.permissions_desc: Styr hvilke Vercel-operationer agenten må udføre.
config.vercel.test_desc: Bekræft at den gemte token kan nå Vercel API.
config.vercel.token_desc: Personal Access Token fra Vercel. Opbevares sikkert i vaultet.
config.vercel.enabled_help: Allows AuraGo to connect to Vercel with the stored token.
config.vercel.readonly_help: Allows reading Vercel data but blocks deploy, create, update, and delete actions.
config.vercel.allow_deploy_help: Permits project deployments when read-only mode is off.
config.vercel.allow_project_management_h: Permits creating, updating, and deleting Vercel projects.
config.vercel.allow_env_management_help: Permits managing Vercel project environment variables.
config.vercel.allow_domain_management_he: Permits adding, updating, and removing Vercel domains.
config.vercel.default_project_id_help: Optional project ID used when the agent does not name a project.
config.vercel.team_id_help: Optional Vercel team ID for team-scoped API calls.
config.vercel.team_slug_help: Optional Vercel team slug for team-scoped API calls.
